debug_info.goal:
E : Type u_1
inst✝¹ : NormedAddCommGroup E
inst✝ : InnerProductSpace ℝ E
f : ℕ → E
h_bdd : ∃ M, ∀ (n : ℕ), ‖f n‖ ≤ M
⊢ ∃ g x, (∀ (n : ℕ), g n ∈ (convexHull ℝ) (Set.range fun m => f (n + m))) ∧ Tendsto g atTop (nhds x)

failed_attempts:
obtain ⟨g, hg_mem, hg_cau⟩ := komlos_convex (fun x ↦ ‖x‖ ^ 2) (fun _ ↦ sq_nonneg _)
    (let ⟨M, hM⟩ := h_bdd; ⟨M ^ 2, fun n ↦ sq_le_sq.mpr (by linarith [hM n, norm_nonneg (f n)])⟩)
  obtain ⟨x, hx⟩ := cauchySeq_tendsto_of_complete (by
    refine cauchySeq_iff_le_tendsto_0.mpr fun ε hε ↦ ?_
    obtain ⟨N, hN⟩ := hg_cau (ε ^ 2 / 4) (by positivity)
    use N, fun n m hn hm ↦ by
      specialize hN n m hn hm
      rw [dist_eq_norm, ← sq_lt_sq, norm_norm]
      · linarith [norm_add_sq_add_norm_sub_sq (g n) (g m)]
      · positivity
      · linarith)
  exact ⟨g, x, fun n ↦ hg_mem n, hx⟩

  obtain ⟨g, hg_hull, hg_lim⟩ := komlos_convex (f := f) (fun x ↦ ‖x‖^2) (fun _ ↦ sq_nonneg _)
    ⟨M ^ 2, fun n ↦ sq_le_sq.2 (by linarith [hM n, norm_nonneg (f n)])⟩

  obtain ⟨x, hx⟩ := cauchySeq_tendsto_of_complete hg_cau
  exact ⟨g, x, fun n ↦ convexHull_eq_convexHull_nnreal _ ▸ hg_hull n, hx⟩

let φ : E → ℝ := fun x ↦ ‖x‖ ^ 2
  have hφ_nonneg : 0 ≤ φ := fun x ↦ sq_nonneg ‖x‖
  obtain ⟨M, hM⟩ := h_bdd
  have hφ_bdd : ∃ M', ∀ n, φ (f n) ≤ M' := ⟨M ^ 2, fun n ↦ sq_le_sq.mpr (by linarith [norm_nonneg (f n), hM n])⟩
  obtain ⟨g, hg, h_cau⟩ := komlos_convex hφ_nonneg hφ_bdd
  have h_cau' : CauchySeq g := by
    refine Metric.cauchySeq_iff.mpr fun ε εpos ↦ ?_
    obtain ⟨N, hN⟩ := h_cau (ε ^ 2 / 4) (by positivity)
    refine ⟨N, fun n m hn hm ↦ ?_⟩
    specialize hN n m hn hm
    rw [dist_eq_norm, ← Real.sqrt_sq (norm_nonneg _), Real.lt_sqrt (norm_nonneg _) (by positivity)]
    have h_para : ‖g n - g m‖ ^ 2 = 4 * (2⁻¹ * ‖g n‖ ^ 2 + 2⁻¹ * ‖g m‖ ^ 2 - ‖(2 : ℝ≥0)⁻¹ • (g n + g m)‖ ^ 2) := by
      simp only [norm_sq_eq_inner, inner_add_left, inner_add_right, inner_sub_left, inner_sub_right,
        inner_smul_left, inner_smul_right, Real.inner_self_eq_norm_sq]
      have : (2 : ℝ≥0)⁻¹ = (2 : ℝ)⁻¹ := rfl
      rw [this]
      linarith [inner_comm (g n) (g m)]
    linarith
  obtain ⟨x, hx⟩ := cauchySeq_tendsto_of_complete h_cau'
  exact ⟨g, x, fun n ↦ convexHull_mono (Set.range_subset_iff.mpr fun m ↦ ⟨m, rfl⟩) (hg n), hx⟩

  obtain ⟨x, hx⟩ := cauchySeq_tendsto_atTop (Metric.cauchySeq_iff.mpr fun ε hε ↦ by

    refine ⟨N, fun n hn m hm ↦ by

  exact ⟨g, x, fun n ↦ convexHull_min (Set.range_subset_iff.2 fun m ↦
    subset_convexHull ℝ _ ⟨m, rfl⟩) (convex_convexHull ℝ _) (hg n), hx⟩

obtain ⟨M, hM⟩ := h_bdd
  let φ : E → ℝ := fun x ↦ ‖x‖^2
  have hφ_nonneg : 0 ≤ φ := fun x ↦ sq_nonneg ‖x‖
  have hφ_bdd : ∃ M' : ℝ, ∀ n, φ (f n) ≤ M' :=
    ⟨max 0 M ^ 2, fun n ↦ sq_le_sq.mpr (by linarith [hM n, norm_nonneg (f n)])⟩
  obtain ⟨g, hg_hull, hg_cau⟩ := komlos_convex hφ_nonneg hφ_bdd
  have hg_cau_seq : CauchySeq g := by
    rw [Metric.cauchySeq_iff]
    intro ε εpos
    obtain ⟨N, hN⟩ := hg_cau (ε^2 / 4) (by positivity)
    refine ⟨N, fun n m hn hm ↦ ?_⟩
    rw [dist_eq_norm, ← sq_lt_sq, norm_nonneg]
    · have : ‖g n - g m‖^2 = 4 * (2⁻¹ * ‖g n‖^2 + 2⁻¹ * ‖g m‖^2 - ‖(2 : ℝ≥0)⁻¹ • (g n + g m)‖^2) := by
        simp only [← inner_self_eq_norm_sq_real, NNReal.coe_inv, NNReal.coe_two, smul_add,
          inner_add_left, inner_add_right, inner_smul_left, inner_smul_right, real_inner_comm]
        ring
      rw [this]
      linarith [hN n m hn hm]
    · positivity
  obtain ⟨x, hx⟩ := exists_tendsto_of_cauchySeq hg_cau_seq
  refine ⟨g, x, fun n ↦ convexHull_min (Set.range_subset_convexHull ℝ _)
    (convex_convexHull ℝ _) (hg_hull n), hx⟩

obtain ⟨M, hM⟩ := h_bdd

  obtain ⟨x, hx⟩ : ∃ x, Tendsto g atTop (𝓝 x) := cauchySeq_iff_tendsto.mp (cauchySeq_of_tendsto_dist_eventually_zero fun ε εpos ↦ by
    obtain ⟨N, hN⟩ := h_cau (ε ^ 2 / 4) (by positivity)
    refine ⟨N, fun n hn m hm ↦ ?_⟩
    rw [dist_eq_norm, ← sq_lt_sq, dist_nonneg, abs_of_nonneg (sq_nonneg _)]
    have := parallelogram_law_with_norm ℝ (g n) (g m)
    have : (2⁻¹ : ℝ) * ‖g n‖ ^ 2 + 2⁻¹ * ‖g m‖ ^ 2 - ‖(2 : ℝ≥0)⁻¹ • (g n + g m)‖ ^ 2 =
        4⁻¹ * (2 * ‖g n‖ ^ 2 + 2 * ‖g m‖ ^ 2 - ‖g n + g m‖ ^ 2) := by
      simp [NNReal.val_inv, norm_smul]; ring
    linarith [hN n m hn hm])
  exact ⟨g, x, fun n ↦ convexHull_min (subset_convexHull ℝ _) (convex_convexHull ℝ _).to_nnreal_convex (hg n), hx⟩

obtain ⟨g, hg, h_cau⟩ := komlos_convex (fun x ↦ ‖x‖^2) (by positivity)

let φ : E → ℝ := fun x ↦ ‖x‖ ^ 2

  obtain ⟨g, hg1, hg2⟩ := komlos_convex hφ_nonneg hφ_bdd
  have hg_cau : CauchySeq g := cauchySeq_of_forall_epsilon_exists_N fun ε hε ↦ by
    obtain ⟨N, hN⟩ := hg2 (ε ^ 2 / 4) (by positivity)
    refine ⟨N, fun n hn m hm ↦ ?_⟩
    specialize hN n m hn hm
    rw [dist_eq_norm, ← sq_lt_sq, norm_norm]
    · simpa [dist_sq_norm_add_sub_two (g n) (g m)] using hN
    · positivity
    · exact hε.le
  obtain ⟨x, hx⟩ := cauchySeq_tendsto_of_complete hg_cau
  refine ⟨g, x, fun n ↦ ?_, hx⟩
  exact convexHull_mono (Set.subset_convexHull ℝ _) (hg1 n)

            simp only [NNReal.val_inv, NNReal.val_ofNat, parallelogram_law_with_norm E]; ring]

  let φ : E → ℝ := fun x ↦ ‖x‖^2

    linarith
  obtain ⟨x, hx⟩ := cauchySeq_tendsto_of_complete hg_cau'
  exact ⟨g, x, fun n ↦ convexHull_min (Set.range_subset_iff.2 fun m ↦

  have h_cau' : CauchySeq g := by
    rw [Metric.cauchySeq_iff]

    use N; intro n hn m hm
    specialize hN n m hn hm
    rw [dist_eq_norm, ← sq_lt_sq, norm_sub_sq_eq_two_norm_sq_add_two_norm_sq_sub_norm_add_sq]
    · have : ‖(2 : ℝ≥0)⁻¹ • (g n + g m)‖^2 = 1/4 * ‖g n + g m‖^2 := by simp [norm_smul]; norm_num
      linarith [norm_nonneg (g n - g m), εpos.le]
    · exact norm_nonneg _
    · exact εpos.le
  obtain ⟨x, hx⟩ := exists_tendsto_of_cauchySeq h_cau'
  exact ⟨g, x, fun n ↦ convexHull_min (Set.range_subset_iff.mpr fun m ↦

  have hg_cau' : CauchySeq g := by

    have h_para : ‖g n - g m‖ ^ 2 = 4 * (2⁻¹ * ‖g n‖ ^ 2 + 2⁻¹ * ‖g m‖ ^ 2 - ‖(2 : ℝ≥0)⁻¹ • (g n + g m)‖ ^ 2) := by

obtain ⟨M, hM⟩ := h_bdd
  obtain ⟨g, hg_hull, hg_cau⟩ := komlos_convex (fun x ↦ ‖x‖^2) (fun x ↦ sq_nonneg ‖x‖)
    ⟨M^2, fun n ↦ sq_le_sq.mpr (by linarith [hM n, norm_nonneg (f n)])⟩
  have hg_cau' : CauchySeq g := by
    refine Metric.cauchySeq_iff.mpr fun ε hε ↦ ?_
    obtain ⟨N, hN⟩ := hg_cau (ε^2 / 4) (by positivity)
    refine ⟨N, fun n hn m hm ↦ ?_⟩
    rw [dist_eq_norm, ← sq_lt_sq, zero_le_norm_sq]
    · specialize hN n m hn hm
      have h_para := parallelogram_law_with_norm ℝ (g n) (g m)
      simp only [NNReal.val_inv, NNReal.val_two, smul_add, norm_smul, NNReal.val_bit0, NNReal.val_one,
        norm_inv, norm_two] at hN
      linarith
    · exact le_of_lt hε
  obtain ⟨x, hx⟩ := cauchySeq_converges hg_cau'
  exact ⟨g, x, fun n ↦ convexHull_min (subset_convexHull ℝ _) (convex_convexHull ℝ _).convex_nnreal (hg_hull n), hx⟩

let φ : E → ℝ := fun x ↦ ‖x‖ ^ 2
  have hφ_nonneg : 0 ≤ φ := fun x ↦ by positivity
  have hφ_bdd : ∃ M' : ℝ, ∀ n, φ (f n) ≤ M' := by
    rcases h_bdd with ⟨M, hM⟩
    exact ⟨M ^ 2, fun n ↦ by dsimp; nlinarith [norm_nonneg (f n), hM n]⟩
  obtain ⟨g, hg_mem, hg_cau⟩ := komlos_convex hφ_nonneg hφ_bdd
  have h_cau : CauchySeq g := by
    rw [Metric.cauchySeq_iff]
    intro ε ε_pos
    obtain ⟨N, hN⟩ := hg_cau (ε ^ 2 / 4) (by positivity)
    refine ⟨N, fun n m hn hm ↦ ?_⟩
    specialize hN n m hn hm
    rw [dist_eq_norm, ← sq_lt_sq, norm_nonneg, abs_of_nonneg (le_of_lt ε_pos)]
    calc ‖g n - g m‖ ^ 2
      = 2 * ‖g n‖ ^ 2 + 2 * ‖g m‖ ^ 2 - ‖g n + g m‖ ^ 2 := by rw [norm_sub_sq, norm_add_sq]; linarith
    _ = 4 * (2⁻¹ * ‖g n‖ ^ 2 + 2⁻¹ * ‖g m‖ ^ 2 - ‖(2⁻¹ : ℝ) • (g n + g m)‖ ^ 2) := by
        simp only [norm_smul, Real.norm_two, Real.norm_inv, sq_inv, norm_add_sq]; linarith
    _ < 4 * (ε ^ 2 / 4) := by
        gcongr
        simp only [φ, NNReal.coe_two, inv_pow, norm_smul, ENNReal.coe_ofNat, ENNReal.coe_div,
          ENNReal.coe_two, inv_pow, Real.norm_two, Real.norm_inv] at hN
        exact hN
    _ = ε ^ 2 := by ring
  obtain ⟨x, hx⟩ := h_cau.exists_tendsto
  exact ⟨g, x, fun n ↦ convexHull_mono_left (by norm_num) (hg_mem n), hx⟩

let φ : E → ℝ := fun x ↦ ‖x‖ ^ 2
  have hφ_nonneg : 0 ≤ φ := fun x ↦ sq_nonneg _
  obtain ⟨M, hM⟩ := h_bdd
  obtain ⟨g, hg, hg'⟩ := komlos_convex hφ_nonneg
    (⟨M ^ 2, fun n ↦ sq_le_sq.mpr (by rw [abs_norm]; exact hM n)⟩)
  have h_cau : CauchySeq g := Metric.cauchySeq_iff.mpr fun ε hε ↦ by
    obtain ⟨N, hN⟩ := hg' (ε ^ 2 / 4) (by positivity)
    refine ⟨N, fun n hn m hm ↦ by
      rw [dist_eq_norm, ← sq_lt_sq, sq_norm]
      · have h_para : ‖g n - g m‖ ^ 2 = 4 * (2⁻¹ * ‖g n‖ ^ 2 + 2⁻¹ * ‖g m‖ ^ 2 - ‖(2 : ℝ≥0)⁻¹ • (g n + g m)‖ ^ 2) := by
          rw [norm_sub_sq, norm_add_sq, ← norm_smul (2 : ℝ)⁻¹, NNReal.smul_def, NNReal.coe_inv, NNReal.coe_two]
          simp only [sq_norm]
          ring
        rw [h_para]
        linarith [hN n m hn hm]
      · exact norm_nonneg _
      · exact le_of_lt hε ⟩
  obtain ⟨x, hx⟩ := cauchySeq_atTop_iff_tendsto.mp h_cau
  exact ⟨g, x, fun n ↦ by rw [← convexHull_nnreal_eq_convexHull_real]; exact hg n, hx⟩

obtain ⟨g, hg_mem, hg_cau⟩ := komlos_convex (φ := fun x ↦ ‖x‖^2) (fun x ↦ sq_nonneg _)
    (by obtain ⟨M, hM⟩ := h_bdd; exact ⟨M^2, fun n ↦ sq_le_sq.2 (by rw [abs_norm]; exact hM n)⟩)
  have hg_cau' : CauchySeq g := Metric.cauchySeq_iff.mpr fun ε hε ↦ by
    obtain ⟨N, hN⟩ := hg_cau (ε^2 / 4) (by positivity)
    refine ⟨N, fun n hn m hm ↦ ?_⟩
    rw [dist_eq_norm, ← sq_lt_sq, abs_norm, InnerProductSpace.dist_sq_avg_of_inner (E := E) (g n) (g m) 0]
    · simp only [sub_zero, NNReal.coe_inv, NNReal.coe_two] at hN
      linarith [hN n m hn hm]
    · positivity
    · positivity
  obtain ⟨x, hx⟩ := hg_cau'.exists_tendsto
  exact ⟨g, x, fun n ↦ convexHull_mono (Set.Subset.refl _) (hg_mem n), hx⟩

obtain ⟨M, hM⟩ := h_bdd
  obtain ⟨g, hg_mem, hg_cau⟩ := komlos_convex (fun x ↦ ‖x‖^2) (fun _ ↦ by positivity)
    ⟨M ^ 2, fun n ↦ sq_le_sq.mpr (by linarith [hM n, norm_nonneg (f n)])⟩
  obtain ⟨x, hx⟩ := (cauchy_of_metric.mpr fun ε hε ↦ (hg_cau (ε ^ 2 / 4) (by positivity)).imp
    fun N hN n m hn hm ↦ by
      rw [dist_eq_norm, ← sq_lt_sq (norm_nonneg _), parallelogram_law_with_norm_real]
      · linarith [hN n m hn hm]
      · exact hε).exists_tendsto
  exact ⟨g, x, fun n ↦ convexHull_mono_left (by induction E; exacts [subset_refl _]) (hg_mem n), hx⟩

obtain ⟨M, hM⟩ := h_bdd
  obtain ⟨g, hg_mem, hg_cau⟩ := komlos_convex (fun x ↦ sq_nonneg ‖x‖)
    ⟨M ^ 2, fun n ↦ pow_le_pow_left (norm_nonneg _) (hM n) 2⟩
  have hg_cau : CauchySeq g := cauchySeq_of_forall_dist_le2 fun δ δpos ↦ by
    obtain ⟨N, hN⟩ := hg_cau (δ ^ 2 / 4) (by positivity)
    refine ⟨N, fun n m hn hm ↦ ?_⟩
    rw [dist_eq_norm, ← sq_lt_sq, norm_norm, abs_of_pos δpos]
    have : ‖g n - g m‖ ^ 2 = 4 * (2⁻¹ * ‖g n‖ ^ 2 + 2⁻¹ * ‖g m‖ ^ 2 - ‖(2 : ℝ≥0)⁻¹ • (g n + g m)‖ ^ 2) := by
      simp only [NNReal.val_inv, NNReal.val_two, norm_pow, NNReal.smul_def, Real.norm_eq_abs, abs_two, inv_pow]
      field_simp; ring
    linarith [this, hN n m hn hm]
  obtain ⟨x, hx⟩ := hg_cau.tendsto_atTop
  exact ⟨g, x, fun n ↦ convexHull_min (Set.subset_convexHull _ _) (convex_convexHull _ _) (hg_mem n), hx⟩

obtain ⟨g, hg, hg_cau⟩ := komlos_convex (fun x ↦ ‖x‖ ^ 2) (fun x ↦ sq_nonneg _)
    (let ⟨M, hM⟩ := h_bdd; ⟨M ^ 2, fun n ↦ sq_le_sq.mpr (by linarith [hM n, norm_nonneg (f n)])⟩)
  obtain ⟨x, hx⟩ := cauchySeq_tendsto_of_complete (Metric.cauchySeq_iff.mpr fun ε εpos ↦
    let ⟨N, hN⟩ := hg_cau (ε ^ 2 / 4) (by positivity)
    ⟨N, fun n hn m hm ↦ by
      rw [dist_eq_norm, ← sq_lt_sq (norm_nonneg _)]
      · simp only [smul_add, NNReal.coe_inv, NNReal.coe_two, norm_pow, norm_norm] at hN
        linarith [hN n m hn hm, parallelogram_law_with_norm ℝ (g n) (g m)]
      · exact le_of_lt εpos⟩)
  exact ⟨g, x, fun n ↦ convexHull_min (subset_convexHull ℝ _) (convex_convexHull ℝ _).convex_nnreal (hg n), hx⟩

obtain ⟨g, hg, hgc⟩ := komlos_convex (φ := fun x ↦ ‖x‖ ^ 2) (fun x ↦ sq_nonneg _)
    (let ⟨M, hM⟩ := h_bdd; ⟨M ^ 2, fun n ↦ sq_le_sq.mpr (by linarith [hM n, norm_nonneg (f n)])⟩)
  obtain ⟨x, hx⟩ := cauchySeq_tendsto_nhds (cauchySeq_iff_norm_tendsto_zero.mpr fun ε hε ↦
    let ⟨N, hN⟩ := hgc (ε ^ 2 / 4) (by positivity);
    ⟨N, fun n hn m hm ↦ (sq_lt_sq.mp (by
      specialize hN n m hn hm; rw [dist_eq_norm, abs_norm, abs_of_pos hε]
      have : ‖g n - g m‖ ^ 2 = 2 * ‖g n‖ ^ 2 + 2 * ‖g m‖ ^ 2 - ‖g n + g m‖ ^ 2 := by
        rw [← norm_add_pow_two_add_norm_sub_pow_two (g n) (g m), add_sub_cancel_left]
      simp [NNReal.smul_def, norm_smul] at hN; linarith))⟩)
  exact ⟨g, x, fun n ↦ convexHull_min (subset_convexHull ℝ _) (convex_iff_nnreal.mp (convex_convexHull ℝ _)) (hg n), hx⟩

obtain ⟨M, hM⟩ := h_bdd
  let φ : E → ℝ := fun x ↦ ‖x‖ ^ 2
  obtain ⟨g, hg1, hg2⟩ := komlos_convex (fun _ ↦ sq_nonneg _)
    ⟨M ^ 2, fun n ↦ sq_le_sq.mpr (by linarith [hM n, norm_nonneg (f n)])⟩
  obtain ⟨x, hx⟩ := cauchySeq_tendsto_of_complete (Metric.cauchySeq_iff.mpr fun ε hε ↦
    let ⟨N, hN⟩ := hg2 (ε ^ 2 / 4) (by positivity)
    ⟨N, fun n hn m hm ↦ by
      rw [dist_eq_norm, ← sq_lt_sq, abs_of_nonneg (norm_nonneg _), abs_of_pos hε]
      specialize hN n m hn hm
      have : ‖g n - g m‖ ^ 2 = 4 * (2⁻¹ * ‖g n‖ ^ 2 + 2⁻¹ * ‖g m‖ ^ 2 - ‖(2 : ℝ≥0)⁻¹ • (g n + g m)‖ ^ 2) := by
        simp [NNReal.smul_def, ← norm_add_pow_two_add_norm_sub_pow_two]
        ring
      linarith⟩)
  exact ⟨g, x, fun n ↦ convexHull_min (Set.range_subset_iff.2 fun m ↦ subset_convexHull ℝ _ ⟨m, rfl⟩)
    ((convex_convexHull ℝ _).convex_mono_left (algebraMap ℝ≥0 ℝ)) (hg1 n), hx⟩

obtain ⟨g, hg, hg_cau⟩ := komlos_convex (fun x ↦ ‖x‖ ^ 2) (fun _ ↦ sq_nonneg _)
    (by obtain ⟨M, hM⟩ := h_bdd; exact ⟨M ^ 2, fun n ↦ sq_le_sq.mpr (by linarith [hM n, norm_nonneg (f n)])⟩)
  have h_cau : CauchySeq g := Metric.cauchySeq_iff.mpr fun ε hε ↦ by
    obtain ⟨N, hN⟩ := hg_cau (ε ^ 2 / 4) (by positivity)
    refine ⟨N, fun n hn m hm ↦ ?_⟩
    specialize hN n m hn hm
    rw [dist_eq_norm, ← sq_lt_sq (norm_nonneg _), ← parallelogram_law_with_norm]
    · simp [norm_smul] at hN; linarith
    · linarith
  obtain ⟨x, hx⟩ := cauchySeq_tendsto_atTop h_cau
  exact ⟨g, x, fun n ↦ convexHull_min (subset_convexHull ℝ _) (convex_convexHull ℝ _).convex_nnreal (hg n), hx⟩

obtain ⟨g, hg, h_cau⟩ := komlos_convex (fun x ↦ ‖x‖^2) (fun x ↦ sq_nonneg ‖x‖) (by
    rcases h_bdd with ⟨M, hM⟩
    exact ⟨M^2, fun n ↦ sq_le_sq.mpr (by rw [abs_norm]; exact hM n)⟩)
  have h_g_cau : CauchySeq g := cauchySeq_of_le_epsilon fun ε hε ↦ by
    obtain ⟨N, hN⟩ := h_cau (ε^2 / 4) (by positivity)
    refine ⟨N, fun n m hn hm ↦ ?_⟩
    specialize hN n m hn hm
    rw [show 2⁻¹ * ‖g n‖^2 + 2⁻¹ * ‖g m‖^2 - ‖(2 : ℝ≥0)⁻¹ • (g n + g m)‖^2 = 4⁻¹ * ‖g n - g m‖^2 by
      simp only [NNReal.val_inv, NNReal.val_two, norm_smul, real_norm_eq_abs, abs_inv,
        abs_two, pow_two, ← parallelogram_law_with_norm ℝ]
      ring] at hN
    rw [← sq_lt_sq₀ (norm_nonneg _) (le_of_lt hε), ← mul_lt_mul_left (four_pos : (0 : ℝ) < 4)]
    linarith
  obtain ⟨x, hx⟩ := cauchySeq_tendsto_atTop h_g_cau
  exact ⟨g, x, fun n ↦ convexHull_min (Set.subset_convexHull ℝ _)
    (convex_convexHull ℝ _).nnreal_convex (hg n), hx⟩

obtain ⟨M, hM⟩ := h_bdd
  obtain ⟨g, hg1, hg2⟩ := komlos_convex (fun x ↦ ‖x‖^2) (fun x ↦ sq_nonneg _)
    ⟨M ^ 2, fun n ↦ by nlinarith [hM n, norm_nonneg (f n)]⟩
  obtain ⟨x, hx⟩ : ∃ x, Tendsto g atTop (𝓝 x) := by
    apply cauchySeq_atTop.exists_tendsto
    refine cauchySeq_of_forall_epsilon_exists_norm_sub_le fun ε εpos ↦ ?_
    obtain ⟨N, hN⟩ := hg2 (ε ^ 2 / 4) (by positivity)
    exact ⟨N, fun n m hn hm ↦ by
      specialize hN n m hn hm
      rw [← norm_sub_sq_div_four] at hN
      linarith [sq_lt_sq.mpr (by linarith [norm_nonneg (g n - g m)])]⟩
  exact ⟨g, x, fun n ↦ convexHull_min (subset_convexHull ℝ _)
    (convex_iff_nnreal.mp (convex_convexHull ℝ _)) (hg1 n), hx⟩

obtain ⟨g, hg, hgc⟩ := komlos_convex (fun x ↦ ‖x‖^2) (fun x ↦ sq_nonneg _)
    (let ⟨M, hM⟩ := h_bdd; ⟨M ^ 2, fun n ↦ sq_le_sq.mpr (by linarith [hM n, norm_nonneg (f n)])⟩)
  obtain ⟨x, hx⟩ := exists_tendsto_of_cauchySeq
    (Metric.cauchySeq_iff.2 fun ε hε ↦
      let ⟨N, hN⟩ := hgc (ε ^ 2 / 4) (by positivity)
      ⟨N, fun n m hn hm ↦ by
        rw [dist_eq_norm, ← sq_lt_sq (norm_nonneg _) hε.le, ← mul_lt_mul_left (by positivity : (0 : ℝ) < 4)]
        linarith [dist_sq_norm_add_dist_sq_norm_sub (g n) (g m), hN n m hn hm]⟩)
  exact ⟨g, x, fun n ↦ (convex_convexHull ℝ _).convex_nnreal.convexHull_subset
    (Set.range_subset_convexHull ℝ _) (hg n), hx⟩

obtain ⟨g, hg1, hg2⟩ := komlos_convex (φ := fun x ↦ ‖x‖ ^ 2) (fun _ ↦ sq_nonneg _)
    (let ⟨M, hM⟩ := h_bdd; ⟨M ^ 2, fun n ↦ sq_le_sq.2 (by rw [abs_norm]; exact hM n)⟩)
  obtain ⟨x, hx⟩ := cauchySeq_tendsto_of_complete (E := E) (cauchySeq_iff_norm_sub_le.2 fun ε hε ↦ by
    obtain ⟨N, hN⟩ := hg2 (ε ^ 2 / 4) (by positivity)
    exact ⟨N, fun n m hn hm ↦ by
      specialize hN n m hn hm
      rw [parallelogram_law_with_norm_sq] at hN
      simp only [NNReal.inv_def, NNReal.coe_two, NNReal.smul_def, norm_smul, norm_inv, norm_two] at hN
      linarith [sq_nonneg ‖g n + g m‖, sq_lt_sq.2 (abs_norm (g n - g m))]⟩)
  exact ⟨g, x, fun n ↦ convexHull_min (Set.range_subset_iff.2 fun m ↦ subset_convexHull ℝ _ ⟨m, rfl⟩)
    (convex_convexHull ℝ _) (hg1 n), hx⟩
